headline: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics Selects Innovaccer Gravity™ as AI and Data Platform for Clinical Laboratory Operations Modernization
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 09, 2026--Innovaccer Inc., a leading healthcare AI company, today announced that Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, a global clinical diagnostics leader and a Danaher company, has selected Gravity, Innovaccer’s enterprise data and AI platform, to support its vision for modernizing and scaling customers’ clinical laboratory operations.

content.title: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics Selects Innovaccer Gravity™ as AI and Data Platform for Clinical Laboratory Operations Modernization
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 09, 2026--Innovaccer Inc., a leading healthcare AI company, today announced that Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, a global clinical diagnostics leader and a Danaher company, has selected Gravity, Innovaccer’s enterprise data and AI platform, to support its vision for modernizing and scaling customers’ clinical laboratory operations.

headline: Danaher’s Beckman Coulter AI Lab Push And What It Means For Investors
summary: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, part of Danaher, announced a partnership with Innovaccer to modernize clinical laboratory operations using AI and a unified data platform. The collaboration centers on integrating Innovaccer’s Gravity platform to provide operational analytics and workflow insights for lab leaders. The initiative is intended to support more efficient lab management and data driven decision making that can influence patient care delivery. For investors watching NYSE:DHR, this move...

headline: Does Danaher’s (DHR) AI Lab Push and Steady Dividend Reveal Its Next Strategic Focus?
summary: Danaher Corporation recently declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of US$0.40 per share, payable on April 24, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 27, 2026, while its Beckman Coulter Diagnostics unit entered an AI-focused collaboration with Innovaccer to modernize and scale clinical laboratory operations. By unifying diagnostic and operational data through Innovaccer’s Gravity platform, Beckman Coulter aims to deliver standardized metrics and AI-driven insights that could...
